data.name: Login.Subtitle
data.value: Sign in to continue to your dashboard

data.name: Auth.RegisterSubtitle
data.value: Sign up for free to get started

data.name: Auth.LogoutMessage
data.value: You have been logged out successfully.

data.name: Insights.NoSavings
data.value: No net savings generated this year.

data.name: Discovery.InsufficientData
data.value: Not enough data to generate discoveries.

data.name: Anomaly.Exceptional
data.value: {0}: exceptional spike (€{1:F2}) with no repeated spike in previous year.

data.name: Annual.EmptyDescription
data.value: Add transactions to see the annual breakdown and dashboard.

data.name: Insights.EmptyYear
data.value: No data for this year. Add transactions to see the annual summary.

data.name: Discovery.InsufficientAdditionalData
data.value: Not enough data to generate additional discoveries.

data.name: Annual.AriaTrendChart
data.value: Monthly trend chart showing income and expenses for each month of the year

data.name: Annual.AriaDistributionChart
data.value: Donut chart showing fixed versus variable income and expenses

data.name: Import.Error.ParseFailed
data.value: Could not parse the uploaded file. Please check the format and try again.

data.name: Import.Error.Unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: Import.Error.InvalidFileFormat
data.value: The file is not a valid Excel document. Please upload a genuine .xls or .xlsx file.

data.name: Import.Parser.SheetNotFound
data.value: The '{0}' sheet was not found in the file. Verify this is an ING statement with a 'Movimientos' sheet.

data.name: Import.Parser.HeaderMismatch
data.value: Invalid header in column {0}: expected '{1}' but found '{2}'.

data.name: Index.HeroDescription
data.value: Import bank statements, track spending by category, set budgets, and get smart analytics — all in one place.

data.name: Index.FeatureExcelImportDescription
data.value: Upload bank statements and let SauronSheet parse your transactions automatically.

data.name: Index.FeatureAnalyticsDescription
data.value: Visualise spending trends, category breakdowns, and yearly comparisons with charts.

data.name: Index.FeatureBudgetDescription
data.value: Set monthly budgets per category and get alerts when you're approaching the limit.

data.name: Error.Description
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

data.name: Dashboard.EmptyDescription
data.value: Import a bank statement or add transactions to see analytics.

data.name: Dashboard.NoExpenseData
data.value: No expense data for this period.

data.name: Upload.ErrorHeading
data.value: Some files could not be processed:

data.name: Upload.ImportCompleteSummary
data.value: Import Complete: {0} imported, {1} skipped across {2} file(s)

data.name: Upload.FormatHeaderDescription
data.value: Row 4 must contain this exact header:

data.name: Upload.FormatDataDescription
data.value: Transaction data starts at row 5. Only .xls and .xlsx files are accepted.

data.name: Upload.FileConstraints
data.value: Excel (.xls / .xlsx) up to 10MB each — multiple files allowed

data.name: Budget.ModalConfirmPrompt
data.value: Are you sure you want to

data.name: Budget.ModalDeactivateDescription
data.value: This budget will stop applying to future periods.

data.name: Budget.DescDeactivate
data.value: This budget will stop applying to future periods.

data.name: Budget.DescActivate
data.value: This budget will apply again to current and future periods.

data.name: Transactions.Index.SourceSummaryNone
data.value: Search and add one or more sources. If none are selected, all sources are shown.

data.name: Transactions.Index.EmptyDescription
data.value: Import a bank statement or add a transaction to get started.

data.name: Transactions.Modal.SingleDeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?

data.name: Transactions.Modal.BulkDeleteWarning
data.value: All selected transactions will be permanently removed.

data.name: Transactions.Add.Hint.Amount
data.value: Use negative values for expenses, positive for income

data.name: Transactions.Add.Hint.Category
data.value: optional — type to search or create

data.name: Transactions.Add.Placeholder.Category
data.value: Search existing or type new category...

data.name: Transactions.Search.NoResultsDescription
data.value: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.

data.name: Categories.Index.Description
data.value: Create and organize custom expense categories. System categories are read-only.

data.name: Categories.Modal.Delete.Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the category {0}?

data.name: Budgets.Index.EmptyDescription
data.value: Create one to start tracking your spending.

data.name: Budgets.Create.Hint.Category
data.value: Choose the category this budget applies to.

data.name: Budgets.Create.Hint.Permanent
data.value: Leave empty for a permanent budget.

data.name: Budgets.Create.Validation.LimitPositive
data.value: Limit must be a positive number.

data.name: Budgets.Create.Validation.UntilAfterFrom
data.value: Effective Until must be on or after Effective From.

data.name: Budgets.Edit.Modal.DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this budget?

data.name: Categories.Subcategories.Description
data.value: Manage subcategories for this category. Auto-created subcategories come from Excel imports.

data.name: Categories.Modal.Delete.SubcategoryConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the subcategory {0}?

data.name: Budgets.History.NoDataDescription
data.value: Select a different year or create budgets to start tracking.

data.name: Budgets.Metrics.NoDataTitle
data.value: No budget data for the current {0}.

data.name: Budgets.Metrics.NoDataDescription
data.value: Create budgets to see your spending metrics.

data.name: Budgets.Comparison.NoDataDescription
data.value: Create budgets to compare them against actual spending.
